falsifier: The cited live run no longer shows a memory-on win or the recorded context overhead bound is not reproducible in the documented setup.
threat_model_scope: Single live run with network-latency denominator; not a universal memory benchmark or a broad quality guarantee.
public_note: Supportive live evidence that memory context can help while search overhead stays small relative to the measured model latency in that run.
claim_boundary: Experimental/supportive live result only. Keep out of broad benchmark wording until replicated with greener current suites.
